text: Stepping into this space, I am struck by a sense of curiosity—the glass and neon lights suggest I am entering a zone dedicated to exploration and intellect. The "R+D" sign and the text on the wall reinforce this feeling: I am on the threshold of innovation, a place where reflection and progress intertwine. The environment feels purposeful but slightly impersonal, with the harsh lights and orderly displays. I feel contemplative, eager to engage with the ideas presented, and aware of my own place within this ever-evolving landscape of knowledge and development.
